name: Tender Flaky Biscuits
recipeIngredient: 1/2 stick cold margarine, cut into small cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450°F (230°C). Prepare a baking sheet.
2. In a medium bowl, mix together the flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
3. Cut in the margarine using pastry blender or fingertips until the mixture forms small pea-sized lumps.
4. Stir in the buttermilk with a fork until the dough comes together as a ball.
5. On a lightly floured surface, roll out the dough into a 10x6-inch rectangle.
6. Fold both short ends towards each other to meet at the center.
7. Fold the dough in half, forming a packet that is 4 layers thick.
8. Roll the dough into a 6-inch square.
9. Using a floured knife, cut the dough into 16 squares with straight downward cuts (do not saw through the dough).
10. Place the biscuits 1 1/2 inches apart on an ungreased baking sheet.
11. Bake for 10-12 minutes until lightly browned. Transfer to a wire rack to cool.
